description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job with an Arch Linux container that installs dependencies, trusts the git repository, checks out the code, builds multiple CMake projects (Profiler GUI, Update utility, Capture utility, Csvexport utility, Import utilities, Library, and Test application) with different configurations, and uploads the resulting binaries as artifacts.
